Name: E. coli (Chemotaxis)
Gamma_note: Low: simple 2-node circuit, near-zero structural-functional NMI (Alon 2007)
Sc_note: 12-node chemotaxis network, sparse; Sc=0.052 from paper (Alon 2007)
Tc_note: Simple methylation adaptation kinetics; Tc=0.015 (Sourjik & Wingreen 2012)

Name: C. elegans
Gamma_note: 0.17: Randi et al. arXiv:2412.14498 (2024), NMI structural vs functional modules
Sc_note: Varshney et al. 2011 PLOS CB: LCC=0.974, k-core/N=0.484, Q=0.308, sigma=0.398 -> geomean=0.490
Tc_note: Kato 2015 Cell + Gordus 2015 Cell: lambda=0.80, Phi=0.40, Psi=0.47, Theta=0.38 -> geomean=0.489

Name: Zebrafish (Larval)
Gamma_note: 0.32: Bhattacharyya et al. eLife 2017, whole-brain structural-functional NMI
Sc_note: Bhattacharyya 2017: 100k neuron mesoscale, Sc=0.310 (paper value retained)
Tc_note: Ahrens 2013 Nature Methods: whole-brain light-sheet, Tc=0.250 (paper value retained)

Name: Drosophila (MB)
Gamma_note: 0.38: Scheffer 2020 + Aso 2014 eLife functional imaging NMI estimate; alpha=3.47 (insect spiking M_eff~32)
Sc_note: Scheffer 2020 eLife: MB 25k, high modularity; Sc=0.450 (paper value retained)
Tc_note: Aso 2014 eLife: MB functional imaging; Tc=0.315 (paper value retained)

Name: Octopus (PNS)
Gamma_note: 0.30: Hochner 2012 Curr Biol; arm-autonomy reduces central structural-functional coupling
Sc_note: Distributed 500M neurons, 2/3 in arms; Sc=0.380 (paper value retained)
Tc_note: Arm dynamics semi-independent; Tc=0.420 (paper value retained)

Name: Mouse (Cortex)
Gamma_note: 0.42: Grandjean et al. NeuroImage 2017, resting-state SC-FC NMI in mouse
Sc_note: Oh 2014 Nature (Allen CCF): Sc=0.650 (paper value retained)
Tc_note: Beggs & Plenz 2003: critical avalanches; Tc=0.510 (paper value retained)

Name: Macaque (CoCoMac)
Gamma_note: 0.48: Honey et al. PNAS 2007, primate structural-functional NMI (range 0.39-0.55, mid=0.48)
Sc_note: Modha 2010 PNAS: 71 cortical regions; Sc=0.720 (paper value retained)

Name: Human (HCP)
Gamma_note: 0.41: Honey et al. PNAS 2009, resting-state NMI=0.39-0.45, midpoint=0.41 (CORRECT anchor)
Sc_note: Hagmann 2008 PLoS Biol: HCP 998 parcels, Sc=0.880

Name: Liquid Time-Constant
Gamma_note: 0.25: continuous ODE dynamics, partial SC-FC alignment; Hasani 2021 NMI
